metadata.description: Android development plugins with unified workflow: Swagger model generation, architecture enforcement, Yandex Tracker integration, Google Developer Knowledge API, and dev-workflow orchestration

plugins.name: swagger-android
plugins.description: Generate Android Kotlin data models from Swagger/OpenAPI specifications

plugins.name: android-arch
plugins.description: Android architecture plugin: create, modify and refactor features with Screen/View/ViewModel, Clean Architecture, Koin/Kodein

plugins.name: yandex-tracker
plugins.description: Yandex Tracker integration: 30+ MCP tools, interactive agent for task execution, workflow skills

plugins.name: google-dev-knowledge
plugins.description: Google Developer Knowledge API: real-time access to official docs from Android, Firebase, Cloud, Chrome, Flutter, TensorFlow, Google AI and more

plugins.name: dev-workflow
plugins.description: Unified development workflow: design, planning, execution, verification, debugging, TDD, and code review. Works on top of any domain-specific plugins.
